    G

    generateRecommendations() - Method in class model.Budget
    Generates budget recommendations based on spending patterns
    getAllIncome() - Method in class model.IncomeTracker
    Retrieves all income entries stored in the tracker.
    getAmount() - Method in class controller.Dashboard.Transaction
    Gets the transaction amount.
    getAmount() - Method in class model.Expense
    Gets the monetary amount of the expense.
    getAmount() - Method in class model.Income
    Gets the monetary amount of the income.
    getAmount() - Method in class model.Reminder
    Returns the financial amount associated with this reminder.
    getBudgetById(String) - Method in class controller.BudgetTracker
    Finds and returns a budget by its ID.
    getBudgetFilePath(int) - Static method in class storage.UserDatabase
    Constructs the file path for a specific user's budget file.
    getBudgetId() - Method in class model.Budget
    Gets the budget ID
    getBudgets() - Method in class controller.BudgetTracker
    Returns a defensive copy of all budgets in the tracker.
    getBudgetsByCategory(String) - Method in class controller.BudgetTracker
    Retrieves all budgets that match the specified category.
    getBudgetTracker() - Static method in class model.SystemManager
    Returns the BudgetTracker instance.
    getCategory() - Method in class controller.Dashboard.BudgetViewModel
    Gets the budget category.
    getCategory() - Method in class controller.Dashboard.Transaction
    Gets the transaction category.
    getCategory() - Method in class model.Budget
    Gets the category for this budget
    getCategory() - Method in class model.Expense
    Gets the category of the expense.
    getCategoryTotals() - Method in class controller.ExpenseTracker
    Calculates the total expense amount for each category.
    getCurrentUser() - Static method in class model.SystemManager
    Gets the currently logged-in user.
    getDate() - Method in class controller.Dashboard.Transaction
    Gets the transaction date.
    getDate() - Method in class model.Expense
    Gets the date when the expense occurred.
    getDate() - Method in class model.Income
    Gets the date when the income was received.
    getDescription() - Method in class model.Expense
    Gets the description of the expense.
    getDescription() - Method in class model.Income
    Gets the description of the income.
    getDueDate() - Method in class model.Reminder
    Returns the due date of this reminder.
    getExpenses() - Method in class controller.ExpenseTracker
    Gets the list of all expenses.
    getExpensesByDateRange(LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class controller.ExpenseTracker
    Gets all expenses within a specified date range.
    getExpensesForMonth(int, int) - Method in class controller.ExpenseTracker
    Gets all expenses for a specific month.

    Returns the ExpenseTracker instance.

    Gets the reminder's unique identifier.

    Gets the unique identifier of the expense.

    Returns the IncomeTracker instance.

    Returns the singleton instance of the BudgetTracker.

    Gets the budget limit.

    Returns the name or description of this reminder.

    Generates the next available user ID.

    Gets the user's password.

    Gets the budget period.

    Gets the time period

    Gets the frequency of recurrence if the expense is recurring.

    Gets the period of recurrence if the income is recurring.

    Returns the reminder date of this reminder.

    Gets the total of all expenses as a double value.

    Gets the transaction type.

    Gets the ID of the user associated with this income.

    Gets the user's unique identifier.

    Retrieves income entries for a specific user.

    Gets the user's username.
